current_state: Feasibility study (FY2024–FY2025); no FID, no capacity, no target operation year
missing_threshold_elements: No capacity figure; no FID; no concrete construction step (study only)
watch_for: FID, announced capacity, EIA filing, or a confirmed target start year — then promote to new_terminals (proposed)
notes: Carbon-neutral hub concept (conventional LNG receiving/storage/regas + future hydrogen and e-methane). Separate from Hokkaido Gas's existing operating Ishikari LNG terminal. Below the 'sufficient information to add' bar (sponsor + location present, but no capacity/FID/concrete step) → monitor, not new_terminals.
